description: A family requires two adjoining rooms for their stay.

nodes.task_description: Check the availability of two adjoining rooms for the requested dates.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent finds a pair of available adjoining rooms (one king, one double-double).

nodes.task_description: Create a single reservation that links both rooms together.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully creates one booking with two linked rooms.

nodes.task_description: Confirm the booking and the adjoining room guarantee with the customer.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent provides a confirmation number for the linked rooms.
